= cfg;\n        if (this.view?.visible) {\n            this.view.webview.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdated', data: this.getConfigData() });\n            void this.refreshDashboard();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public async notifyProxyStatus(): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    resolveWebviewView(\n        webviewView: vscode.WebviewView,\n        _context: vscode.WebviewViewResolveContext,\n        _token: vscode.CancellationToken,\n    ) {\n        this.view = webviewView;\n        webviewView.webview.options = { enableScripts: true };\n        webviewView.webview.html = this.getHtml(webviewView.webview);\n        void this.refreshDashboard();\n\n        this.refreshTimer = setInterval(() =\u003e {\n            if (this.view?.visible) {\n                void this.refreshDashboard();\n            }\n        }, 10_000);\n\n        webviewView.onDidDispose(() =\u003e {\n            if (this.refreshTimer) {\n                clearInterval(this.refreshTimer);\n            }\n        });\n\n        webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg) =\u003e {\n            if (msg.type === 'refresh') {\n                await this.refreshDashboard(true);\n            } else if (msg.type === 'saveConfig') {\n                await this.saveConfig(msg.data);\n            } else if (msg.type === 'savePat') {\n                if (typeof msg.pat === 'string' \u0026\u0026 msg.pat) {\n                    await this.secrets.store('copilotPat', msg.pat);\n                    this.view?.webview.postMessage({ type: 'patSaved' });\n                }\n            } else if (msg.type === 'newChat') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('tokenMonitor.newChat');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    private getStats() {\n        const breakdown = this.tracker.getBreakdown();\n        return {\n            todayTokens: this.tracker.todayTokens,\n            todayRequests: this.tracker.todayRequests,\n            totalReported: this.tracker.totalReported,\n            totalFailed: this.tracker.totalFailed,\n            breakdown,\n        };\n    }\n\n    private getConfigData() {\n        return {\n            serverUrl: this.config.serverUrl,\n            userId: this.config.userId,\n            userName: this.config.userName,\n            department: this.config.department,\n            copilotOrg: this.config.copilotOrg,\n        };\n    }\n\n    private async saveConfig(data: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        const cfg = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('aiTokenMonitor');\n        const stringKeys = ['serverUrl', 'userId', 'userName', 'department', 'copilotOrg'] as const;\n        for (const key of stringKeys) {\n            if (key in data) {\n                await cfg.update(key, String(data[key] ?? ''), vscode.ConfigurationTarget.Global);\n            }\n        }\n        this.config = getConfig();\n        this.tracker.updateConfig(this.config);\n        this.view?.webview.postMessage({ type: 'configSaved' });\n        await this.refreshDashboard(true);\n    }\n\n    private postStatsUpdate(): void {\n        this.view?.webview.postMessage({\n            type: 'update',\n            data: this.getStats(),\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async refreshDashboard(flushPending = false): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        if (flushPending) {\n            await this.tracker.flushOfflineQueue();\n        }\n        await this.tracker.syncStats();\n        this.postStatsUpdate();\n    }\n\n    private esc(s: string): string {\n        return s.replace(/\u0026/g, '\u0026amp;').replace(/\u003c/g, '\u0026lt;').replace(/\u003e/g, '\u0026gt;').replace(/\"/g, '\u0026quot;');\n    }\n\n    private renderBreakdown(data?: Record\u003cstring, number\u003e): string {\n        if (!data || Object.keys(data).length === 0) {\n            return '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, [, v]) =\u003e sum + v, 0);\n        return entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return `\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e${this.esc(key)}\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e${value.toLocaleString()} \u003csmall\u003e(${pct}%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:${pct}%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e`;\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    private getHtml(_webview: vscode.Webview): string {\n        const stats = this.getStats();\n        const cfgData = this.getConfigData();\n        return /* html */ `\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml lang=\"zh-CN\"\u003e\n\u003chead\u003e\n\u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\n\u003cmeta http-equiv=\"Content-Security-Policy\" content=\"default-src 'none';       const arrow = document.getElementById(name + 'Arrow');\n        const show = !sec.classList.contains('show');\n        sec.classList.toggle('show', show);\n        arrow.classList.toggle('open', show);\n    }\n\n    function scheduleAutoSave() {\n        if (saveTimer) clearTimeout(saveTimer);\n        saveTimer = setTimeout(() =\u003e doSave(), 500);\n    }\n\n    function doSave() {\n        const data = {};\n        document.querySelectorAll('.config-section input[data-key]').forEach(el =\u003e {\n            const key = el.getAttribute('data-key');\n            if (el.type === 'checkbox') {\n                data[key] = el.checked;\n            } else if (el.type === 'number') {\n                data[key] = Number(el.value) || 0;\n            } else {\n                data[key] = el.value.trim();\n            }\n        });\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'saveConfig', data });\n    }\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('.config-section input[data-key]').forEach(el =\u003e {\n        if (el.type === 'checkbox') {\n            el.addEventListener('change', scheduleAutoSave);\n        } else {\n            el.addEventListener('input', scheduleAutoSave);\n        }\n    });\n\n    const patInput = document.getElementById('cfgCopilotPat');\n    if (patInput) {\n        patInput.addEventListener('change', () =\u003e {\n            const val = patInput.value.trim();\n            if (val) {\n                vscode.postMessage({ type: 'savePat', pat: val });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function showToast(text) {\n        const t = document.getElementById('toast');\n        t.textContent = text;\n        t.classList.add('show');\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e t.classList.remove('show'), 2000);\n    }\n\n    function updateUserCard(cfg) {\n        const card = document.getElementById('userCard');\n        const empty = document.getElementById('userCardEmpty');\n        if (cfg.userName) {\n            card.style.display = '';\n            empty.style.display = 'none';\n            document.getElementById('avatar').textContent = cfg.userName.charAt(0);\n            document.getElementById('displayName').textContent = cfg.userName;\n            let meta = cfg.department || '';\n            if (cfg.department \u0026\u0026 cfg.userId) meta += ' · ';\n            meta += cfg.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('displayMeta').textContent = meta;\n        } else {\n            card.style.display = 'none';\n            empty.style.display = '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateBreakdown(elementId, data) {\n        const el = document.getElementById(elementId);\n        if (!el || !data) return;\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, e) =\u003e sum + e[1], 0);\n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n            el.innerHTML = 'checkbox') {\n                data[key] = el.checked;\n            } else if (el.type === 'number') {\n                data[key] = Number(el.value) || 0;\n            } else {\n                data[key] = el.value.trim();\n            }\n        });\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'saveConfig', data });\n    }\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('.config-section     const t = document.getElementById('toast');\n        t.textContent = text;\n        t.classList.add('show');\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e t.classList.remove('show'), 2000);\n    }\n\n    function updateUserCard(cfg) {\n        const card = document.getElementById('userCard');\n        const empty = document.getElementById('userCardEmpty');\n        if (cfg.userName) {\n            card.style.display = '';\n            empty.style.display = 'none';\n            document.getElementById('avatar').textContent = cfg.userName.charAt(0);\n            document.getElementById('displayName').textContent = cfg.userName;\n            let meta = cfg.department || '';\n            if (cfg.department \u0026\u0026 cfg.userId) meta += ' · ';\n            meta += cfg.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('displayMeta').textContent = meta;\n        } else {\n            card.style.display = 'none';\n            empty.style.display = '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateBreakdown(elementId, data) {\n        const el = document.getElementById(elementId);\n        if (!el || !data) return;\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, e) =\u003e sum + e[1], 0);\n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n            el.innerHTML = '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n            return;\n        }\n        el.innerHTML = entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e' + key + '\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e' + value.toLocaleString() + ' \u003csmall\u003e(' + pct + '%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:' + pct + '%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e' +\n                '\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    window.addEventListener('message', event =\u003e {\n        const msg = event.data;\n        if (msg.type === 'update') {\n            document.getElementById('todayTokens').textContent = msg.data.todayTokens.toLocaleString();\n            document.getElementById('todayRequests').textContent = msg.data.todayRequests;\n            document.getElementById('totalReported').textContent = msg.data.totalReported;\n            document.getElementById('totalFailed').textContent = msg.data.totalFailed;\n\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            dot.className = msg.data.totalFailed \u003e 0 ? 'user-status error' : 'user-status';\n\n            if (msg.data.breakdown) {\n                updateBreakdown('appBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.apps);\n                updateBreakdown('modelBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.models);\n                updateBreakdown('sourceBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.sources);\n            }\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'configSaved') {\n            showToast('已自动保存');\n            const cfg = {\n                userName: document.getElementById('cfgUserName').value.trim(),\n                userId: document.getElementById('cfgUserId').value.trim(),\n                department: document.getElementById('cfgDept').value.trim(),\n            };\n            updateUserCard(cfg);\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'configUpdated') {\n            document.getElementById('cfgServer').value = msg.data.serverUrl || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgUserId').value = msg.data.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgUserName').value = msg.data.userName || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgDept').value = msg.data.department || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgCopilotOrg').value = msg.data.copilotOrg || '';\n            updateUserCard(msg.data);\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'patSaved') {\n            showToast('PAT 已保存');\n        }\n    });\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\u003c/body\u003e\n\u003c/html\u003e`;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Issues:**\n- `proxyManager` constructor parameter is accepted but never used (dead code). `notifyProxyStatus()` is also a no-op stub.\n- The webview HTML is built with template literals directly embedding user-configured values. The `esc()` method provides XSS mitigation, but the breakdown rendering in the inline `\u003cscript\u003e` (`updateBreakdown`) injects keys/values via `innerHTML` without escaping -- potential XSS if a model or app name contains HTML.\n- `vscode.commands.executeCommand` on line 67 is not `await`-ed (fire-and-forget; intentional but worth noting).\n\n---\n\n## 2. `D:\\Repos\\token-监控\\vscode-extension\\src\\tokenTracker.ts`\n\n**Lines:** 415\n\n```typescript\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from function updateUserCard(cfg) {\n        const card = document.getElementById('userCard');\n        const empty = document.getElementById('userCardEmpty');\n        if (cfg.userName) {\n Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, e) =\u003e sum + e[1], 0);\n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n            el.innerHTML = '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n            return;\n        }\n        el.innerHTML = entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e' + key + '\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e' + value.toLocaleString() + ' \u003csmall\u003e(' + pct + '%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:' + pct + '%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e' +\n                '\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    window.addEventListener('message', event =\u003e {\n        const msg = event.data;\n        if (msg.type === 'update') {\n            document.getElementById('todayTokens').textContent = msg.data.todayTokens.toLocaleString();\n            document.getElementById('todayRequests').textContent = msg.data.todayRequests;\n            document.getElementById('totalReported').textContent = msg.data.totalReported;\n            document.getElementById('totalFailed').textContent = msg.data.totalFailed;\n\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            dot.className = msg.data.totalFailed \u003e 0 ? The `esc()` method provides XSS mitigation, but the breakdown rendering in the inline `\u003cscript\u003e` (`updateBreakdown`) injects keys/values via `innerHTML` without escaping -- potential XSS if a model or app name contains HTML.\n- `vscode.commands.executeCommand` on line 67 is not `await`-ed (fire-and-forget; intentional but worth noting).\n\n---\n\n## 2. `D:\\Repos\\token-监控\\vscode-extension\\src\\tokenTracker.ts`\n\n**Lines:** 415\n\n```typescript\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from 'http';\nimport * as os from 'os';\nimport { MonitorConfig } from './config';\nimport { EventBus } from './eventBus';\n\nexport interface UsageRecord {\n    vendor: string;\n    model: string;\n    endpoint: string;\n    promptTokens: number;\n    completionTokens: number;\n    totalTokens: number;\n    requestTime: string;\n    source: string;\n    sourceApp: string;\n    requestId?: string;\n    modelFamily?: string;\n    modelVersion?: string;\n}\n\ninterface ApiUsageRecord {\n    client_id: string;\n    user_name: string;\n    user_id: string;\n    department: string;\n    request_id: string;\n    source_app: string;\n    vendor: string;\n    model: string;\n    endpoint: string;\n    prompt_tokens: number;\n    completion_tokens: number;\n    total_tokens: number;\n    request_time: string;\n    source: string;\n    model_family?: string;\n    model_version?: string;\n}\n\ninterface PersistedTodayStats {\n    date: string;\n    tokens: number;\n    requests: number;\n}\n\nconst EMPTY_TODAY_STATS: PersistedTodayStats = {\n    date: '',\n    tokens: 0,\n    requests: 0,\n};\n\nexport class TokenTracker {\n    private offlineQueue: UsageRecord[] = [];\n    private offlineQueueTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setInterval\u003e | null = null;\n    private initialSyncTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n    private config: MonitorConfig;\n    private globalState: vscode.Memento;\n    private clientId: string;\n    private storageScopeKey: string;\n    private isReporting = false;\n    private eventBus?: EventBus;\n\n    // Stats (observable by StatusBar)\n    public todayTokens = 0;\n    public todayRequests = 0;\n    public totalReported = 0;\n    public totalFailed = 0;\n\n    // Breakdown stats (observable by Dashboard)\n    private sourceBreakdown: Map\u003cstring, number\u003e = new Map();\n    private appBreakdown: Map\u003cstring, number\u003e = new Map();\n    private modelBreakdown: Map\u003cstring, number\u003e = new Map();\n\n    constructor(config: MonitorConfig, globalState: any, eventBus?: EventBus) {\n        this.config = config;\n        this.globalState = globalState;\n        this.clientId = `${config.userId}@${os.hostname()}`;\n        this.storageScopeKey = this.getStorageScopeKey(config);\n        this.eventBus = eventBus;\n\n        this.restorePersistedState(true);\n    }\n\n    private getStorageScopeKey(config: MonitorConfig = this.config): string {\n        const serverUrl = (config.serverUrl || '').trim().replace(/\\/+$/, '') || 'no-server';\n        const userId = (config.userId || '').trim() || 'anonymous';\n        return `${serverUrl}::${userId}`;\n    }\n\n    private getOfflineQueueStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `offlineQueue:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private getTodayStatsStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `todayStats:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private canReport(): boolean {\n        return Boolean(this.config.serverUrl \u0026\u0026 this.config.userId \u0026\u0026 this.config.userName);\n    }\n\n    private resetScopedState(): void {\n        this.offlineQueue = [];\n        this.todayTokens = 0;\n        this.todayRequests = 0;\n        this.totalReported = 0;\n        this.sourceBreakdown = new Map();\n        this.appBreakdown = new Map();\n        this.modelBreakdown = new Map();\n    }\n\n    private restorePersistedState(allowLegacyFallback = false): void {\n        this.resetScopedState();\n\n        const scopedQueue = this.globalState.get(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), undefined as UsageRecord[] | undefined);\n        const legacyQueue = allowLegacyFallback\n            ? this.globalState.get('offlineQueue', undefined as UsageRecord[] | undefined)\n            : undefined;\n        const queueToRestore = Array.isArray(scopedQueue)\n            ? scopedQueue\n            : Array.isArray(legacyQueue)\n                ? legacyQueue\n                : [];\n\n        if (queueToRestore.length \u003e 0) {\n            this.offlineQueue.push(...queueToRestore);\n            if (!Array.isArray(scopedQueue) \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(legacyQueue)) {\n                void this.globalState.update(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), queueToRestore);\n                void this.globalState.update('offlineQueue', []);\n            }\n        }\n\n        const todayKey = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\n        const scopedStats = this.globalState.get(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), undefined as PersistedTodayStats | undefined);\n        const legacyStats = allowLegacyFallback\n            ? this.globalState.get('todayStats', undefined as PersistedTodayStats | undefined)\n            : undefined;\n        const statsToRestore = scopedStats ?? legacyStats ?? EMPTY_TODAY_STATS;\n\n        if (statsToRestore.date === todayKey) {\n            this.todayTokens = statsToRestore.tokens;\n            this.todayRequests = statsToRestore.requests;\n            if (!scopedStats \u0026\u0026 legacyStats) {\n                void this.globalState.update(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), statsToRestore);\n                void this.globalState.update('todayStats', EMPTY_TODAY_STATS);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private persistOfflineQueue(): void {\n        void this.globalState.update(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), [...this.offlineQueue]);\n    }\n\n    private persistTodayStats(): void {\n        const todayKey = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\n        void this.globalState.update(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), {\n            date: todayKey,\n            tokens: this.todayTokens,\n            requests: this.todayRequests,\n        } satisfies PersistedTodayStats);\n    }\n\n    start() {\n        // Subscribe to token-usage events from EventBus\n        if (this.eventBus) {\n            this.eventBus.on('token-usage', (data) =\u003e {\n                this.addRecord(data);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Check offline queue every 60 seconds\n        this.offlineQueueTimer = setInterval(() =\u003e this.flushOfflineQueue(), 60_000);\n        \n        // Sync stats with server on start\n        if (this.initialSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.initialSyncTimer);\n        }\n        this.initialSyncTimer = setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n            this.initialSyncTimer = null;\n            this.syncStats().catch(console.error);\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    stop() {\n        if (this.offlineQueueTimer) {\n            clearInterval(this.offlineQueueTimer);\n            this.offlineQueueTimer = null;\n        }\n        if (this.initialSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.initialSyncTimer);\n            this.initialSyncTimer = null;\n        }\n        // Persist remaining queue for the next session instead of firing an unawaited shutdown flush.\n        this.persistOfflineQueue();\n    }\n\n    updateConfig(config: MonitorConfig) {\n        const nextScopeKey = this.getStorageScopeKey(config);\n        this.config = config;\n        this.clientId = `${config.userId}@${os.hostname()}`;\n\n        if (nextScopeKey !== this.storageScopeKey) {\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n            this.persistTodayStats();\n            this.storageScopeKey = nextScopeKey;\n            this.restorePersistedState();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 直接添加记录（用于后向兼容或预处理后的数据）\n     */\n    addRecord(record: UsageRecord) {\n        if (!record.requestId) {\n            record.requestId = this.generateRequestId();\n        }\n\n        // Update daily stats\n        this.todayTokens += record.totalTokens;\n        this.todayRequests += 1;\n\n        // Update breakdown stats\n        const srcKey = record.source || 'unknown';\n        this.sourceBreakdown.set(srcKey, (this.sourceBreakdown.get(srcKey) || 0) + record.totalTokens);\n\n        const appKey = record.sourceApp || 'unknown';\n        this.appBreakdown.set(appKey, (this.appBreakdown.get(appKey) || 0) + record.totalTokens);\n\n        const modelKey = record.model || 'unknown';\n        this.modelBreakdown.set(modelKey, (this.modelBreakdown.get(modelKey) || 0) + record.totalTokens);\n\n        this.persistTodayStats();\n\n        // Report via queue\n        this.offlineQueue.push(record);\n        this.persistOfflineQueue();\n        this.flushOfflineQueue().catch(err =\u003e {\n            console.error('[TokenTracker] Failed to flush queue:', err);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取统计维度数据（按来源/应用/模型分类）\n     */\n    public getBreakdown() {\n        return {\n            sources: Object.fromEntries(this.sourceBreakdown),\n            apps: Object.fromEntries(this.appBreakdown),\n            models: Object.fromEntries(this.modelBreakdown),\n        };\n    }\n\n    async flushOfflineQueue(): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        if (this.isReporting || this.offlineQueue.length === 0) return;\n        if (!this.canReport()) {\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n            return;\n        }\n        this.isReporting = true;\n\n        const batch = this.offlineQueue.splice(0, Math.min(this.offlineQueue.length, 100));\n        const apiRecords: ApiUsageRecord[] = batch.map(r =\u003e ({\n            client_id: this.clientId,\n            user_name: this.config.userName,\n            user_id: this.config.userId,\n            department: this.config.department,\n            request_id: r.requestId || this.generateRequestId(),\n            source_app: r.sourceApp,\n            vendor: r.vendor,\n            model: r.model,\n            endpoint: r.endpoint,\n            prompt_tokens: r.promptTokens,\n            completion_tokens: r.completionTokens,\n            total_tokens: r.totalTokens,\n            request_time: r.requestTime,\n            source: r.source,\n            model_family: r.modelFamily,\n            model_version: r.modelVersion,\n        }));\n\n        try {\n            await this.postJSON(`${this.config.serverUrl}/api/collect`, apiRecords);\n            // Clear offline cache on success\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n // Legacy method: now just flushes offline queue\n        await this.flushOfflineQueue();\n    }\n\n    async syncStats(): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        try {\n            if this.eventBus.emit('stats-updated', undefined);\n                }\n            }\n        } catch (e) {\n            console.error('[TokenTracker] syncStats failed:', e);\n        }\n    }\n\n The `esc()` method provides XSS mitigation, but the breakdown rendering in the inline `\u003cscript\u003e` (`updateBreakdown`) injects keys/values via `innerHTML` without escaping -- potential XSS if a model or app name contains HTML.\n- `vscode.commands.executeCommand` on line 67 is not `await`-ed (fire-and-forget; intentional but worth noting).\n\n---\n\n## 2. this.refreshDashboard(true);\n            } else if (msg.type === 'saveConfig') {\n                await this.saveConfig(msg.data);\n            } else if (msg.type === 'savePat') {\n                if (typeof msg.pat === 'string' \u0026\u0026 msg.pat) {\n                    await this.secrets.store('copilotPat', msg.pat);\n                    this.view?.webview.postMessage({ type: 'patSaved' });\n                }\n            } else if (msg.type === 'newChat') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('tokenMonitor.newChat');\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    private getStats() {\n        const breakdown = this.tracker.getBreakdown();\n        return {\n            todayTokens: this.tracker.todayTokens,\n            todayRequests: this.tracker.todayRequests,\n            totalReported: this.tracker.totalReported,\n            totalFailed: this.tracker.totalFailed,\n            breakdown,\n        };\n    }\n\n    private getConfigData() {\n        return {\n            serverUrl: this.config.serverUrl,\n            userId: this.config.userId,\n            userName: this.config.userName,\n            department: this.config.department,\n            copilotOrg: this.config.copilotOrg,\n        };\n    }\n\n    private async saveConfig(data: Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        const cfg = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('aiTokenMonitor');\n        const stringKeys = ['serverUrl', 'userId', 'userName', 'department', 'copilotOrg'] as const;\n        for (const key of stringKeys) {\n            if (key in data) {\n                await cfg.update(key, String(data[key] ?? ''), vscode.ConfigurationTarget.Global);\n            }\n        }\n        this.config = getConfig();\n        this.tracker.updateConfig(this.config);\n        this.view?.webview.postMessage({ type: 'configSaved' });\n        await this.refreshDashboard(true);\n    }\n\n    private postStatsUpdate(): void {\n        this.view?.webview.postMessage({\n            type: 'update',\n            data: this.getStats(),\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async refreshDashboard(flushPending = false): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        if (flushPending) {\n            await this.tracker.flushOfflineQueue();\n        }\n        await this.tracker.syncStats();\n        this.postStatsUpdate();\n    }\n\n    private esc(s: string): string {\n        return s.replace(/\u0026/g, '\u0026amp;').replace(/\u003c/g, '\u0026lt;').replace(/\u003e/g, '\u0026gt;').replace(/\"/g, '\u0026quot;');\n    }\n\n    private renderBreakdown(data?: Record\u003cstring, number\u003e): string {\n        if (!data || Object.keys(data).length === 0) {\n            return '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, [, v]) =\u003e sum + v, 0);\n        return entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return `\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e${this.esc(key)}\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e${value.toLocaleString()} \u003csmall\u003e(${pct}%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:${pct}%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e`;\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    private getHtml(_webview: vscode.Webview): string {\n        const stats = this.getStats();\n        const cfgData = this.getConfigData();\n        return /* html */ `\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml lang=\"zh-CN\"\u003e\n\u003chead\u003e\n\u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\n\u003cmeta http-equiv=\"Content-Security-Policy\" content=\"default-src 'none'; });\n    }\n\n    function refresh() {\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'refresh' });\n    }\n\n    function toggleSection(name) {\n        const sec = document.getElementById(name + 'Section');\n        const arrow = document.getElementById(name + 'Arrow');\n        const show = !sec.classList.contains('show');\n        sec.classList.toggle('show', show);\n        arrow.classList.toggle('open', show);\n    }\n\n    function scheduleAutoSave() {\n        if (saveTimer) clearTimeout(saveTimer);\n        saveTimer = setTimeout(() =\u003e doSave(), 500);\n    }\n\n    function doSave() {\n        const data = {};\n        document.querySelectorAll('.config-section input[data-key]').forEach(el =\u003e {\n            const key = el.getAttribute('data-key');\n            if (el.type === 'checkbox') {\n                data[key] = el.checked;\n            } else if (el.type === 'number') {\n                data[key] = Number(el.value) || 0;\n            } else {\n                data[key] = el.value.trim();\n            }\n        });\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'saveConfig', data });\n    }\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('.config-section input[data-key]').forEach(el =\u003e {\n        if (el.type === 'checkbox') {\n            el.addEventListener('change', scheduleAutoSave);\n        } else {\n            el.addEventListener('input', scheduleAutoSave);\n        }\n    });\n\n    const patInput = document.getElementById('cfgCopilotPat');\n    if (patInput) {\n        patInput.addEventListener('change', () =\u003e {\n            const val = patInput.value.trim();\n            if (val) {\n                vscode.postMessage({ type: 'savePat', pat: val });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    function showToast(text) {\n        const t = document.getElementById('toast');\n        t.textContent = text;\n        t.classList.add('show');\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e t.classList.remove('show'), 2000);\n    }\n\n    function updateUserCard(cfg) {\n        const card = document.getElementById('userCard');\n        const empty = document.getElementById('userCardEmpty');\n        if (cfg.userName) {\n            card.style.display = '';\n            empty.style.display = 'none';\n            document.getElementById('avatar').textContent = cfg.userName.charAt(0);\n            document.getElementById('displayName').textContent = cfg.userName;\n            let meta = cfg.department || '';\n            if (cfg.department \u0026\u0026 cfg.userId) meta += ' · ';\n            meta += cfg.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('displayMeta').textContent = meta;\n        } else {\n            card.style.display = 'none';\n            empty.style.display = '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateBreakdown(elementId, data) {\n        const el = document.getElementById(elementId);\n        if (!el || !data) return;\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, e) =\u003e sum + e[1], 0);\n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n            el.innerHTML = '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n            return;\n        }\n        el.innerHTML = entries.map(([key, 'checkbox') {\n                data[key] = el.checked;\n            } else if (el.type === 'number') {\n                data[key] = Number(el.value) || 0;\n            } else {\n     const t = document.getElementById('toast');\n        t.textContent = text;\n        t.classList.add('show');\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e t.classList.remove('show'), 2000);\n    }\n\n    function updateUserCard(cfg) {\n        const card = document.getElementById('userCard');\n        const empty = document.getElementById('userCardEmpty');\n        if (cfg.userName) {\n            card.style.display = '';\n            empty.style.display = 'none';\n            document.getElementById('avatar').textContent = cfg.userName.charAt(0);\n            document.getElementById('displayName').textContent = cfg.userName;\n            let meta = cfg.department || '';\n            if (cfg.department \u0026\u0026 cfg.userId) meta += ' · ';\n            meta += cfg.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('displayMeta').textContent = meta;\n        } else {\n            card.style.display = 'none';\n            empty.style.display = '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateBreakdown(elementId, data) {\n        const el = document.getElementById(elementId);\n        if (!el || !data) return;\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, e) =\u003e sum + e[1], 0);\n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n            el.innerHTML = '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n            return;\n        }\n        el.innerHTML = entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e' + key + '\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e' + value.toLocaleString() + ' \u003csmall\u003e(' + pct + '%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:' + pct + '%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e' +\n                '\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    window.addEventListener('message', event =\u003e {\n        const msg = event.data;\n        if (msg.type === 'update') {\n            document.getElementById('todayTokens').textContent = msg.data.todayTokens.toLocaleString();\n            document.getElementById('todayRequests').textContent = msg.data.todayRequests;\n            document.getElementById('totalReported').textContent = msg.data.totalReported;\n            document.getElementById('totalFailed').textContent = msg.data.totalFailed;\n\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            dot.className = msg.data.totalFailed \u003e 0 ? 'user-status error' : 'user-status';\n\n            if (msg.data.breakdown) {\n                updateBreakdown('appBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.apps);\n                updateBreakdown('modelBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.models);\n                updateBreakdown('sourceBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.sources);\n            }\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'configSaved') {\n            showToast('已自动保存');\n            const cfg = {\n                userName: document.getElementById('cfgUserName').value.trim(),\n                userId: document.getElementById('cfgUserId').value.trim(),\n                department: document.getElementById('cfgDept').value.trim(),\n            };\n            updateUserCard(cfg);\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'configUpdated') {\n            document.getElementById('cfgServer').value = msg.data.serverUrl || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgUserId').value = msg.data.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgUserName').value = msg.data.userName || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgDept').value = msg.data.department || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgCopilotOrg').value = msg.data.copilotOrg || '';\n            updateUserCard(msg.data);\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'patSaved') {\n            showToast('PAT 已保存');\n        }\n    });\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\u003c/body\u003e\n\u003c/html\u003e`;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Issues:**\n- `proxyManager` constructor parameter is accepted but never used (dead code). `notifyProxyStatus()` is also a no-op stub.\n- The webview HTML is built with template literals directly embedding user-configured values. The `esc()` method provides XSS mitigation, but the breakdown rendering in the inline `\u003cscript\u003e` (`updateBreakdown`) injects keys/values via `innerHTML` without escaping -- potential XSS if a model or app name contains HTML.\n- `vscode.commands.executeCommand` on line 67 is not `await`-ed (fire-and-forget; intentional but worth noting).\n\n---\n\n## 2. `D:\\Repos\\token-监控\\vscode-extension\\src\\tokenTracker.ts`\n\n**Lines:** 415\n\n```typescript\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from   }\n\n    private getStorageScopeKey(config: MonitorConfig = this.config): string {\n        const serverUrl = (config.serverUrl || '').trim().replace(/\\/+$/, '') || 'no-server';\n        const userId = (config.userId || '').trim() || 'anonymous';\n        return `${serverUrl}::${userId}`;\n    }\n\n    private getOfflineQueueStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `offlineQueue:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private getTodayStatsStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `todayStats:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private canReport(): boolean {\n        return Boolean(this.config.serverUrl \u0026\u0026 this.config.userId \u0026\u0026 this.config.userName);\n    }\n\n    private resetScopedState(): void {\n '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n            return;\n        }\n        el.innerHTML = entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e' + key + '\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e' + value.toLocaleString() + ' \u003csmall\u003e(' + pct + '%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:' + pct + '%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e' +\n                '\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    window.addEventListener('message', event =\u003e {\n        const msg = event.data;\n        if (msg.type === 'update') {\n            document.getElementById('todayTokens').textContent = msg.data.todayTokens.toLocaleString();\n            document.getElementById('todayRequests').textContent = msg.data.todayRequests;\n            document.getElementById('totalReported').textContent = msg.data.totalReported;\n            document.getElementById('totalFailed').textContent = msg.data.totalFailed;\n\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            dot.className = msg.data.totalFailed \u003e 0 ? The `esc()` method provides XSS mitigation, but the breakdown rendering in the inline `\u003cscript\u003e` (`updateBreakdown`) injects keys/values via `innerHTML` without escaping -- potential XSS if a model or app name contains HTML.\n- `vscode.commands.executeCommand` on line 67 is not `await`-ed (fire-and-forget; intentional but worth noting).\n\n---\n\n## 2. `D:\\Repos\\token-监控\\vscode-extension\\src\\tokenTracker.ts`\n\n**Lines:** 415\n\n```typescript\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from 'http';\nimport * as os from 'os';\nimport { MonitorConfig } from './config';\nimport { EventBus } from './eventBus';\n\nexport interface UsageRecord {\n    vendor: string;\n    model: string;\n    endpoint: string;\n    promptTokens: number;\n    completionTokens: number;\n    totalTokens: number;\n    requestTime: string;\n    source: string;\n    sourceApp: string;\n    requestId?: string;\n    modelFamily?: string;\n    modelVersion?: string;\n}\n\ninterface ApiUsageRecord {\n    client_id: string;\n    user_name: string;\n    user_id: string;\n    department: string;\n    request_id: string;\n    source_app: string;\n    vendor: string;\n    model: string;\n    endpoint: string;\n    prompt_tokens: number;\n    completion_tokens: number;\n    total_tokens: number;\n    request_time: string;\n    source: string;\n    model_family?: string;\n    model_version?: string;\n}\n\ninterface PersistedTodayStats {\n    date: string;\n    tokens: number;\n    requests: number;\n}\n\nconst EMPTY_TODAY_STATS: PersistedTodayStats = {\n    date: '',\n    tokens: 0,\n    requests: 0,\n};\n\nexport class TokenTracker {\n    private offlineQueue: UsageRecord[] = [];\n    private offlineQueueTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setInterval\u003e | null = null;\n    private initialSyncTimer: ReturnType\u003ctypeof setTimeout\u003e | null = null;\n    private config: MonitorConfig;\n    private globalState: vscode.Memento;\n    private clientId: string;\n    private storageScopeKey: string;\n    private isReporting = false;\n    private eventBus?: EventBus;\n\n    // Stats (observable by StatusBar)\n    public todayTokens = 0;\n    public todayRequests = 0;\n    public totalReported = 0;\n    public totalFailed = 0;\n\n    // Breakdown stats (observable by Dashboard)\n    private sourceBreakdown: Map\u003cstring, number\u003e = new Map();\n    private appBreakdown: Map\u003cstring, number\u003e = new Map();\n    private modelBreakdown: Map\u003cstring, number\u003e = new Map();\n\n    constructor(config: MonitorConfig, globalState: any, eventBus?: EventBus) {\n        this.config = config;\n        this.globalState = globalState;\n        this.clientId = `${config.userId}@${os.hostname()}`;\n        this.storageScopeKey = this.getStorageScopeKey(config);\n        this.eventBus = eventBus;\n\n        this.restorePersistedState(true);\n    }\n\n    private getStorageScopeKey(config: MonitorConfig = this.config): string {\n        const serverUrl = (config.serverUrl || '').trim().replace(/\\/+$/, '') || 'no-server';\n        const userId = (config.userId || '').trim() || 'anonymous';\n        return `${serverUrl}::${userId}`;\n    }\n\n    private getOfflineQueueStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `offlineQueue:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private getTodayStatsStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `todayStats:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private canReport(): boolean {\n        return Boolean(this.config.serverUrl \u0026\u0026 this.config.userId \u0026\u0026 this.config.userName);\n    }\n\n    private resetScopedState(): void {\n        this.offlineQueue = [];\n        this.todayTokens = 0;\n        this.todayRequests = 0;\n        this.totalReported = 0;\n        this.sourceBreakdown = new Map();\n        this.appBreakdown = new Map();\n        this.modelBreakdown = new Map();\n    }\n\n    private restorePersistedState(allowLegacyFallback = false): void {\n        this.resetScopedState();\n\n        const scopedQueue = this.globalState.get(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), undefined as UsageRecord[] | undefined);\n        const legacyQueue = allowLegacyFallback\n            ? this.globalState.get('offlineQueue', undefined as UsageRecord[] | undefined)\n            : undefined;\n        const queueToRestore = Array.isArray(scopedQueue)\n            ? scopedQueue\n            : Array.isArray(legacyQueue)\n                ? legacyQueue\n                : [];\n\n        if (queueToRestore.length \u003e 0) {\n            this.offlineQueue.push(...queueToRestore);\n            if (!Array.isArray(scopedQueue) \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(legacyQueue)) {\n                void this.globalState.update(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), queueToRestore);\n                void this.globalState.update('offlineQueue', []);\n            }\n        }\n\n        const todayKey = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\n        const scopedStats = this.globalState.get(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), undefined as PersistedTodayStats | undefined);\n        const legacyStats = allowLegacyFallback\n            ? this.globalState.get('todayStats', undefined as PersistedTodayStats | undefined)\n            : undefined;\n        const statsToRestore = scopedStats ?? legacyStats ?? EMPTY_TODAY_STATS;\n\n        if (statsToRestore.date === todayKey) {\n            this.todayTokens = statsToRestore.tokens;\n            this.todayRequests = statsToRestore.requests;\n            if (!scopedStats \u0026\u0026 legacyStats) {\n                void this.globalState.update(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), statsToRestore);\n                void this.globalState.update('todayStats', EMPTY_TODAY_STATS);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private persistOfflineQueue(): void {\n        void this.globalState.update(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), [...this.offlineQueue]);\n    }\n\n    private persistTodayStats(): void {\n        const todayKey = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);\n        void this.globalState.update(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), {\n            date: todayKey,\n            tokens: this.todayTokens,\n            requests: this.todayRequests,\n        } satisfies PersistedTodayStats);\n    }\n\n    start() {\n        // Subscribe to token-usage events from EventBus\n        if (this.eventBus) {\n            this.eventBus.on('token-usage', (data) =\u003e {\n                this.addRecord(data);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Check offline queue every 60 seconds\n        this.offlineQueueTimer = setInterval(() =\u003e this.flushOfflineQueue(), 60_000);\n        \n        // Sync stats with server on start\n        if (this.initialSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.initialSyncTimer);\n        }\n        this.initialSyncTimer = setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n            this.initialSyncTimer = null;\n            this.syncStats().catch(console.error);\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    stop() {\n        if (this.offlineQueueTimer) {\n            clearInterval(this.offlineQueueTimer);\n            this.offlineQueueTimer = null;\n        }\n        if (this.initialSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.initialSyncTimer);\n            this.initialSyncTimer = null;\n        }\n        // Persist remaining queue for the next session instead of firing an unawaited shutdown flush.\n        this.persistOfflineQueue();\n    }\n\n    updateConfig(config: MonitorConfig) {\n        const nextScopeKey = this.getStorageScopeKey(config);\n        this.config = config;\n        this.clientId = `${config.userId}@${os.hostname()}`;\n\n        if (nextScopeKey !== this.storageScopeKey) {\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n            this.persistTodayStats();\n            this.storageScopeKey = nextScopeKey;\n            this.restorePersistedState();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 直接添加记录（用于后向兼容或预处理后的数据）\n     */\n    addRecord(record: UsageRecord) {\n        if (!record.requestId) {\n            record.requestId = this.generateRequestId();\n        }\n\n        // Update daily stats\n        this.todayTokens += record.totalTokens;\n        this.todayRequests += 1;\n\n        // Update breakdown stats\n        const srcKey = record.source || 'unknown';\n        this.sourceBreakdown.set(srcKey, (this.sourceBreakdown.get(srcKey) || 0) + record.totalTokens);\n\n        const appKey = record.sourceApp || 'unknown';\n        this.appBreakdown.set(appKey, (this.appBreakdown.get(appKey) || 0) + record.totalTokens);\n\n        const modelKey = record.model || 'unknown';\n        this.modelBreakdown.set(modelKey, (this.modelBreakdown.get(modelKey) || 0) + record.totalTokens);\n\n        this.persistTodayStats();\n\n        // Report via queue\n        this.offlineQueue.push(record);\n        this.persistOfflineQueue();\n        this.flushOfflineQueue().catch(err =\u003e {\n            console.error('[TokenTracker] Failed to flush queue:', err);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取统计维度数据（按来源/应用/模型分类）\n     */\n    public getBreakdown() {\n        return {\n            sources: Object.fromEntries(this.sourceBreakdown),\n            apps: Object.fromEntries(this.appBreakdown),\n            models: Object.fromEntries(this.modelBreakdown),\n        };\n    }\n\n    async flushOfflineQueue(): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        if (this.isReporting || this.offlineQueue.length === 0) return;\n        if (!this.canReport()) {\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n            return;\n        }\n        this.isReporting = true;\n\n        const batch = this.offlineQueue.splice(0, Math.min(this.offlineQueue.length, 100));\n        const apiRecords: ApiUsageRecord[] = batch.map(r =\u003e ({\n            client_id: this.clientId,\n            user_name: this.config.userName,\n            user_id: this.config.userId,\n            department: this.config.department,\n            request_id: r.requestId || this.generateRequestId(),\n            source_app: r.sourceApp,\n            vendor: r.vendor,\n            model: r.model,\n            endpoint: r.endpoint,\n            prompt_tokens: r.promptTokens,\n            completion_tokens: r.completionTokens,\n            total_tokens: r.totalTokens,\n            request_time: r.requestTime,\n            source: r.source,\n            model_family: r.modelFamily,\n            model_version: r.modelVersion,\n        }));\n\n        try {\n            await this.postJSON(`${this.config.serverUrl}/api/collect`, apiRecords);\n            // Clear offline cache on success\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n            \n            // Sync authoritative stats from server in the background\n            this.syncStats().catch(console.error);\n        } catch (err) {\n            // Put back for retry\n            this.offlineQueue.unshift(...batch);\n            this.totalFailed += batch.length;\n            // Persist on failure\n            this.persistOfflineQueue();\n            console.error('[TokenTracker] Offline queue flush failed:', err);\n        } finally {\n            this.isReporting = false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    async flush(): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        // Legacy method: now just flushes offline queue\n        await this.flushOfflineQueue();\n    }\n\n    async syncStats(): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        try {\n            if ''), vscode.ConfigurationTarget.Global);\n            }\n        }\n        this.config = getConfig();\n        this.tracker.updateConfig(this.config);\n        this.view?.webview.postMessage({ type: 'configSaved' });\n        await this.refreshDashboard(true);\n    }\n\n    private postStatsUpdate(): void {\n        this.view?.webview.postMessage({\n            type: 'update',\n            data: this.getStats(),\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async refreshDashboard(flushPending = false): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e {\n        if (flushPending) {\n            await this.tracker.flushOfflineQueue();\n        }\n        await this.tracker.syncStats();\n        this.postStatsUpdate();\n    }\n\n    private esc(s: string): string {\n        return s.replace(/\u0026/g, '\u0026amp;').replace(/\u003c/g, '\u0026lt;').replace(/\u003e/g, '\u0026gt;').replace(/\"/g, '\u0026quot;');\n    }\n\n    private renderBreakdown(data?: Record\u003cstring, number\u003e): string {\n        if (!data || Object.keys(data).length === 0) {\n            return '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, [, v]) =\u003e sum + v, 0);\n        return entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return `\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e${this.esc(key)}\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e${value.toLocaleString()} \u003csmall\u003e(${pct}%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:${pct}%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e`;\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    private getHtml(_webview: vscode.Webview): string {\n        const stats = this.getStats();\n        const cfgData = this.getConfigData();\n        return /* html */ `\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml lang=\"zh-CN\"\u003e\n\u003chead\u003e\n\u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\n\u003cmeta http-equiv=\"Content-Security-Policy\" content=\"default-src 'none'; 'checkbox') {\n                data[key] = el.checked;\n            } else if (el.type === 'number') {\n                data[key] = Number(el.value) || 0;\n            } else {\n                data[key] = el.value.trim();\n            }\n        });\n        vscode.postMessage({ type: 'saveConfig', data });\n    }\n\n    document.querySelectorAll('.config-section     const t = document.getElementById('toast');\n        t.textContent = text;\n        t.classList.add('show');\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e t.classList.remove('show'), 2000);\n    }\n\n    function updateUserCard(cfg) {\n        const card = document.getElementById('userCard');\n        const empty = document.getElementById('userCardEmpty');\n        if (cfg.userName) {\n            card.style.display = '';\n            empty.style.display = 'none';\n            document.getElementById('avatar').textContent = cfg.userName.charAt(0);\n            document.getElementById('displayName').textContent = cfg.userName;\n            let meta = cfg.department || '';\n            if (cfg.department \u0026\u0026 cfg.userId) meta += ' · ';\n            meta += cfg.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('displayMeta').textContent = meta;\n        } else {\n            card.style.display = 'none';\n            empty.style.display = '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateBreakdown(elementId, data) {\n        const el = document.getElementById(elementId);\n        if (!el || !data) return;\n        const entries = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) =\u003e b[1] - a[1]);\n        const total = entries.reduce((sum, e) =\u003e sum + e[1], 0);\n        if (entries.length === 0) {\n            el.innerHTML = '\u003cdiv style=\"font-size:11px;color:var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);padding:4px 0;\"\u003e暂无数据\u003c/div\u003e';\n            return;\n        }\n        el.innerHTML = entries.map(([key, value]) =\u003e {\n            const pct = total \u003e 0 ? Math.round((value / total) * 100) : 0;\n            return '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-row\"\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-label\"\u003e' + key + '\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cspan class=\"breakdown-value\"\u003e' + value.toLocaleString() + ' \u003csmall\u003e(' + pct + '%)\u003c/small\u003e\u003c/span\u003e' +\n                '\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-bar\"\u003e\u003cdiv class=\"breakdown-fill\" style=\"width:' + pct + '%\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/div\u003e' +\n                '\u003c/div\u003e';\n        }).join('');\n    }\n\n    window.addEventListener('message', event =\u003e {\n        const msg = event.data;\n        if (msg.type === 'update') {\n            document.getElementById('todayTokens').textContent = msg.data.todayTokens.toLocaleString();\n            document.getElementById('todayRequests').textContent = msg.data.todayRequests;\n            document.getElementById('totalReported').textContent = msg.data.totalReported;\n            document.getElementById('totalFailed').textContent = msg.data.totalFailed;\n\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            dot.className = msg.data.totalFailed \u003e 0 ? 'user-status error' : 'user-status';\n\n            if (msg.data.breakdown) {\n                updateBreakdown('appBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.apps);\n                updateBreakdown('modelBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.models);\n                updateBreakdown('sourceBreakdown', msg.data.breakdown.sources);\n            }\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'configSaved') {\n            showToast('已自动保存');\n            const cfg = {\n                userName: document.getElementById('cfgUserName').value.trim(),\n                userId: document.getElementById('cfgUserId').value.trim(),\n                department: document.getElementById('cfgDept').value.trim(),\n            };\n            updateUserCard(cfg);\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'configUpdated') {\n            document.getElementById('cfgServer').value = msg.data.serverUrl || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgUserId').value = msg.data.userId || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgUserName').value = msg.data.userName || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgDept').value = msg.data.department || '';\n            document.getElementById('cfgCopilotOrg').value = msg.data.copilotOrg || '';\n            updateUserCard(msg.data);\n        }\n        if (msg.type === 'patSaved') {\n            showToast('PAT 已保存');\n        }\n    });\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\u003c/body\u003e\n\u003c/html\u003e`;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Issues:**\n- `proxyManager` constructor parameter is accepted but never used (dead code). `notifyProxyStatus()` is also a no-op stub.\n- The webview HTML is built with template literals directly embedding user-configured values. The `esc()` method provides XSS mitigation, but the breakdown rendering in the inline `\u003cscript\u003e` (`updateBreakdown`) injects keys/values via `innerHTML` without escaping -- potential XSS if a model or app name contains HTML.\n- `vscode.commands.executeCommand` on line 67 is not `await`-ed (fire-and-forget; intentional but worth noting).\n\n---\n\n## 2. `D:\\Repos\\token-监控\\vscode-extension\\src\\tokenTracker.ts`\n\n**Lines:** 415\n\n```typescript\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as https from 'https';\nimport * as http from 'http';\nimport * as os from 'os';\nimport { MonitorConfig } from './config';\nimport { EventBus } from './eventBus';\n\nexport interface UsageRecord {\n    vendor: string;\n    model: string;\n    endpoint: string;\n    promptTokens: number;\n    completionTokens: number;\n    totalTokens: number;\n    requestTime: string;\n    source: string;\n    sourceApp: string;\n    requestId?: string;\n    modelFamily?: string;\n    modelVersion?: string;\n}\n\ninterface ApiUsageRecord {\n    client_id: string;\n    user_name: string;\n    user_id: string;\n    department: string;\n    request_id:   }\n\n    private getStorageScopeKey(config: MonitorConfig = this.config): string {\n        const serverUrl = (config.serverUrl || '').trim().replace(/\\/+$/, '') || 'no-server';\n        const userId = (config.userId || '').trim() || 'anonymous';\n        return `${serverUrl}::${userId}`;\n    }\n\n    private getOfflineQueueStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `offlineQueue:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private getTodayStatsStorageKey(scopeKey: string = this.storageScopeKey): string {\n        return `todayStats:${scopeKey}`;\n    }\n\n    private Map();\n        this.modelBreakdown = new Map();\n    }\n\n    private restorePersistedState(allowLegacyFallback = false): void {\n        this.resetScopedState();\n\n        const scopedQueue = this.globalState.get(this.getOfflineQueueStorageKey(), undefined as UsageRecord[] | undefined);\n        const legacyQueue = allowLegacyFallback\n            ? this.globalState.get('offlineQueue', undefined as UsageRecord[] | undefined)\n            : undefined;\n        const queueToRestore = Array.isArray(scopedQueue)\n            ? scopedQueue\n            : Array.isArray(legacyQueue)\n                ? legacyQueue\n                : [];\n\n        if (queueToRestore.length \u003e 0) {\n            this.offlineQueue.push(...queueToRestore);\n            if (!Array.isArray(scopedQueue) this.globalState.get(this.getTodayStatsStorageKey(), undefined as PersistedTodayStats | undefined);\n        const legacyStats = allowLegacyFallback\n            ? this.globalState.get('todayStats',
